title: Om Nom Frog
description: This resource pack replaces frog with Om Nom from Cut the Rope
body:
![Om Nom](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/WandererEdges/Modrinth/main/a9.png)
## Description

**Om Nom Frog** - In this resource pack, the frog is replaced by Om Nom from the game Cut the Rope and the frog spawn egg, slime, and tadpole are changed.
![Om Nom and items](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/WandererEdges/Modrinth/main/ag8.png)
- - - -
![Optifine required](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/WandererEdges/Modrinth/main/nFESfBi.png)
This pack uses an OptiFine feature called Custom Entity Models (CEM) and CIT Resewn.
- - - -
